mapper.select: select * from law_file_upload where user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0
select * from law_file_upload where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into law_file_upload (user_id, knowledge_id, processing_status, file_name, file_type, file_size, file_path, content, ai_review_result, ai_revised_content, risk_level, upload_time) values (#{userId}, #{knowledgeId}, #{processingStatus}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{filePath}, #{content}, #{aiReviewResult}, #{aiRevisedContent}, #{riskLevel}, now())
mapper.update: update law_file_upload set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM law_file_upload WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY upload_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM law_file_upload WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM law_file_upload WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY upload_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM law_file_upload WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
